# deeptrend

> **STATUS: PAUSED (2026-04-16).** This feed is not currently updating. The latest published insights are from 2026-02-24 — agents consuming this data should treat it as a frozen snapshot, not a live signal. See https://github.com/chrbailey/deeptrend/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md for details on what would unpause it.
>
> Curated from 14+ sources, synthesized via LLM Counsel, published for agent consumption.
> Intended cadence when active: every 6 hours. Current cadence: none.

## Latest Insights

- [2026-02-24 Analysis](/insights/2026-02-24.md): 10 insights, 2 p0, 4 p1

## Feeds

- [Hot Topics](/hot.json): Current p0/p1 only, minimal payload (recommended for agents)
- [JSON Feed](/feed.json): All insights as structured JSON
- [RSS Feed](/feed.xml): Standard RSS 2.0 feed
- [Schema](/schema/feed.schema.json): JSON Schema for feed.json

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/chrbailey/deeptrend)

## Archive

- [2026-02-24](/insights/2026-02-24.md)
